title: Artificial Intelligence (AI)
summary: 9618 — AI types, machine learning basics, and ethical implications.
learningObjectives: Define AI and distinguish narrow vs general AI.
Outline machine learning and training data.
Describe expert systems and neural networks at syllabus level.
Evaluate benefits and risks of AI deployment.

simpleExplanation.title: Machines that learn patterns
simpleExplanation.summary: AI systems perform tasks requiring human-like intelligence. Machine learning improves performance from data without explicit programming of every rule.
steps: Narrow AI: specific task (e.g. image recognition).

sections.content: **Artificial Intelligence** (18.1) is contemporary **9618 P3** content. Balance **technical outline** with **ethical evaluation**.
